Bash(curl -s "https://api.unsplash.com/search/photos?query=%EC%A0%9C%EC%A3%BC%EB%8F%84+%EB%A7%9B%EC%A7%91&orientation=landscape&per_page=1" -H "Authorization: Client-ID $\(grep UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY /home/master/blog-tool/.env 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2\)" 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'total results: {d.get\(\\"total\\",0\)}'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5000/generate -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"keyword":"best coffee shops","platform":"tistory","tone":"informative","category":"travel","subtype":""}' 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
if 'error' in data:
    print\('ERROR:', data['error']\); sys.exit\(1\)
body = data['body']
thumbnail = data.get\('thumbnail', ''\)
imgs = re.findall\(r'<img[^>]*src=[\\"\\\\']\([^\\"\\\\' ]+unsplash[^\\"\\\\' ]+\)[\\"\\\\']', body\)
thumb_id = thumbnail.split\('?'\)[0].split\('/'\)[-1] if thumbnail else ''
print\(f'썸네일: {thumb_id}'\)
print\(f'본문 Unsplash 이미지: {len\(imgs\)}개'\)
ids = [u.split\('?'\)[0].split\('/'\)[-1] for u in imgs]
for i, pid in enumerate\(ids, 1\):
    hero = ' ← hero' if i==1 and pid==thumb_id else ''
    print\(f'  [{i}] {pid}{hero}'\)
h2_ids = [p for p in ids if p != thumb_id]
print\(f'\\nh2 이미지 {len\(h2_ids\)}개, 고유 {len\(set\(h2_ids\)\)}개'\)
print\('✅ 중복 없음!' if len\(h2_ids\)==len\(set\(h2_ids\)\) else '❌ 중복 있음!'\)
print\('✅ 썸네일 분리됨!' if thumb_id and thumb_id not in h2_ids else \('⚠️ 썸네일 없음' if not thumb_id else '❌ 썸네일 중복!'\)\)
has_overlay = 'position:absolute' in body and 'linear-gradient' in body
print\('✅ 오버레이 적용' if has_overlay else '❌ 오버레이 미적용'\)
ad_count = body.count\('ad-container'\)
text_len = len\(re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', body\).strip\(\)\)
expected = 3 if text_len >= 3000 else 2
print\(f'✅ 애드센스 {ad_count}개 \({text_len}자\)' if ad_count==expected else f'❌ 애드센스 {ad_count}개 \(기대 {expected}, {text_len}자\)'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5000/generate -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"keyword":"best coffee shops","platform":"tistory","tone":"informative","category":"travel","subtype":""}' 2>&1 | python3 << 'PYEOF'
import sys, json, re
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
if 'error' in data:
    print\('ERROR:', data['error']\); sys.exit\(1\)
body = data['body']
thumbnail = data.get\('thumbnail', ''\)
imgs = re.findall\(r'<img[^>]*src=["\\x27]\([^"\\x27 ]+unsplash[^"\\x27 ]+\)["\\x27]', body\)
thumb_id = thumbnail.split\('?'\)[0].split\('/'\)[-1] if thumbnail else ''
print\(f'썸네일: {thumb_id}'\)
print\(f'본문 Unsplash 이미지: {len\(imgs\)}개'\)
ids = [u.split\('?'\)[0].split\('/'\)[-1] for u in imgs]
for i, pid in enumerate\(ids, 1\):
    hero = ' <- hero' if i==1 and pid==thumb_id else ''
    print\(f'  [{i}] {pid}{hero}'\)
h2_ids = [p for p in ids if p != thumb_id]
print\(f'\\nh2 이미지 {len\(h2_ids\)}개, 고유 {len\(set\(h2_ids\)\)}개'\)
if len\(h2_ids\) == len\(set\(h2_ids\)\):
    print\('✅ h2 이미지 간 중복 없음!'\)
else:
    print\('❌ h2 이미지 간 중복 있음!'\)
if thumb_id and thumb_id not in h2_ids:
    print\('✅ 썸네일과 h2 이미지 분리됨!'\)
elif not thumb_id:
    print\('⚠️ 썸네일 없음'\)
else:
    print\('❌ 썸네일이 h2 이미지와 중복!'\)
has_overlay = 'position:absolute' in body and 'linear-gradient' in body
if has_overlay:
    print\('✅ 대표이미지 제목 오버레이 적용됨'\)
else:
    print\('❌ 대표이미지 오버레이 미적용'\)
ad_count = body.count\('ad-container'\)
text_len = len\(re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', body\).strip\(\)\)
expected = 3 if text_len >= 3000 else 2
if ad_count == expected:
    print\(f'✅ 애드센스 {ad_count}개 \(본문 {text_len}자, 기대값 {expected}개\)'\)
else:
    print\(f'❌ 애드센스 {ad_count}개 \(본문 {text_len}자, 기대값 {expected}개\)'\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json, re

with open\('/tmp/gen_test.json'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

if 'error' in data:
    print\('ERROR:', data['error']\)
    exit\(1\)

body = data['body']
thumbnail = data.get\('thumbnail', ''\)

# Extract only unsplash img tags
imgs = re.findall\(r'<img[^>]*src=["\\x27]\([^"\\x27 ]*unsplash[^"\\x27 ]*\)["\\x27]', body\)
thumb_id = thumbnail.split\('?'\)[0].split\('/'\)[-1] if thumbnail else ''

print\(f'썸네일: {thumb_id or "\(없음\)"}'\)
print\(f'본문 Unsplash 이미지: {len\(imgs\)}개'\)
ids = [u.split\('?'\)[0].split\('/'\)[-1] for u in imgs]
for i, pid in enumerate\(ids, 1\):
    hero = ' <- hero\(대표이미지\)' if i == 1 and pid == thumb_id else ''
    print\(f'  [{i}] {pid}{hero}'\)

h2_ids = [p for p in ids if p != thumb_id]
print\(f'\\nh2 이미지 {len\(h2_ids\)}개, 고유 {len\(set\(h2_ids\)\)}개'\)
print\('✅ h2 이미지 간 중복 없음!' if len\(h2_ids\) == len\(set\(h2_ids\)\) else '❌ h2 이미지 간 중복 있음!'\)

if thumb_id and thumb_id not in h2_ids:
    print\('✅ 썸네일과 h2 이미지 분리됨!'\)
elif not thumb_id:
    print\('⚠️ 썸네일 없음'\)
else:
    print\('❌ 썸네일이 h2 이미지와 중복!'\)

has_overlay = 'position:absolute' in body and 'linear-gradient' in body
print\('✅ 대표이미지 제목 오버레이 적용됨' if has_overlay else '❌ 대표이미지 오버레이 미적용'\)

ad_count = body.count\('ad-container'\)
text_len = len\(re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', body\).strip\(\)\)
expected = 3 if text_len >= 3000 else 2
ok = '✅' if ad_count == expected else '❌'
print\(f'{ok} 애드센스 {ad_count}개 \(본문 {text_len}자, 기대값 {expected}개\)'\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import os, re, requests
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\('/home/master/blog-tool/.env'\)

key = os.environ.get\("UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY", ""\)
headers = {"Authorization": f"Client-ID {key}"}

# Test 1: Korean keyword directly
q1 = "제주도 맛집"
r1 = requests.get\("https://api.unsplash.com/search/photos",
    params={"query": q1, "orientation": "landscape", "per_page": 1},
    headers=headers, timeout=10\)
print\(f'Korean "{q1}": {r1.json\(\).get\("total", 0\)} results'\)

# Test 2: Simulate translation
import anthropic
client = anthropic.Anthropic\(\)
resp = client.messages.create\(
    model="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001",
    max_tokens=60,
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Translate to concise English keywords for Unsplash image search. Reply with ONLY the English keywords:\\n제주도 맛집"}],
\)
en = resp.content[0].text.strip\(\).strip\('"'\).strip\("'"\)
print\(f'Translated: "{en}"'\)

# Test 3: English translated keyword
r2 = requests.get\("https://api.unsplash.com/search/photos",
    params={"query": en, "orientation": "landscape", "per_page": 1},
    headers=headers, timeout=10\)
print\(f'English "{en}": {r2.json\(\).get\("total", 0\)} results'\)
if r2.json\(\).get\("results"\):
    print\(f'  photo id: {r2.json\(\)["results"][0]["id"]}'\)
PYEOF)

import requests, os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\('/home/master/blog-tool/.env'\)
key = os.environ.get\("UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY", ""\)
headers = {"Authorization": f"Client-ID {key}"}

# Test various simple queries
for q in ["Jeju food", "Korean restaurant", "Korean food", "Jeju island"]:
    r = requests.get\("https://api.unsplash.com/search/photos",
        params={"query": q, "orientation": "landscape", "per_page": 1},
        headers=headers, timeout=10\)
    total = r.json\(\).get\("total", 0\)
    print\(f'"{q}": {total} results'\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import os, requests
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\('/home/master/blog-tool/.env'\)
key = os.environ.get\("UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY", ""\)

r = requests.get\("https://api.unsplash.com/search/photos",
    params={"query": "Jeju food", "orientation": "landscape", "per_page": 1},
    headers={"Authorization": f"Client-ID {key}"},
    timeout=10\)
print\(f'Status: {r.status_code}'\)
print\(f'Rate limit remaining: {r.headers.get\("X-Ratelimit-Remaining", "?"\)}'\)
print\(f'Results: {r.json\(\).get\("total", 0\) if r.status_code == 200 else r.text[:200]}'\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import anthropic

client = anthropic.Anthropic\(\)
tests = ["제주도 맛집", "서울 야경 명소", "부산 해운대 해변", "경복궁 단풍"]

for text in tests:
    resp = client.messages.create\(
        model="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001",
        max_tokens=30,
        messages=[{"role": "user", "content": \(
            "Translate this Korean text into 2-3 simple English words "
            "for an Unsplash photo search. Reply with ONLY the words, "
            "no punctuation or explanation:\\n" + text
        \)}],
    \)
    en = resp.content[0].text.strip\(\).strip\('"'\).strip\("'"\).split\(","\)[0].strip\(\)
    print\(f'  "{text}" -> "{en}"'\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 -c "
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\('/home/master/blog-tool/.env'\)
import anthropic
client = anthropic.Anthropic\(\)
tests = ['제주도 맛집', '서울 야경 명소', '부산 해운대 해변', '경복궁 단풍']
for text in tests:
    resp = client.messages.create\(model='claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens=30,
        messages=[{'role':'user','content':'Translate this Korean text into 2-3 simple English words for an Unsplash photo search. Reply with ONLY the words, no punctuation or explanation:\\n'+text}]\)
    en = resp.content[0].text.strip\(\).strip\('\\"'\).strip\(chr\(39\)\).split\(','\)[0].strip\(\)
    print\(f'{text} -> {en}'\)
")
